title: GTM Engineer
description:
Akeneo is the Product Experience (PX) company and global leader in Product Information Management (PIM), creating a world where every product interaction is an experience that guides consumers and professionals to the best purchase, anytime, anywhere.


We're all about experience \- from the best\-in\-class product we build to the inspiring environment we create for our employees. You'll grow in a dynamic environment where your ideas and expertise will make an impact from day one. Our flexible work model empowers you to thrive, balancing professional success with personal fulfillment. At Akeneo, you’ll be part of a supportive and collaborative team that values open communication, shared successes, and meaningful relationships.


Learn more about our culture and values via our Career page.


As our first GTM Engineer, you will treat the sales funnel as a technical product. You are the architect of growth experiments and the primary bridge between market intent and revenue execution.


Your goal is to eliminate manual prospecting and increase conversion rates.

### **Job description**

* Design and own the automated workflows that ingest raw signals—like tech\-stack changes or website behavior—and transform them into ready\-to\-act leads for Sales.
* Support the integration of LLMs to automate deep\-dive account research and generate hyper\-personalized outreach at a scale that maintains human\-level relevance.
* Build the "connective tissue" across the revenue stack using Python, SQL, and REST APIs, ensuring seamless data orchestration between tools like Salesforce and Slack.
* Drive the technical setup and A/B testing for new growth hypotheses, moving from idea to live, instrumented campaigns in days by bypassing traditional dev backlogs.
* Develop scalable flows in Clay, Cargo, or n8n to sanitize unstructured data and validate new third\-party intent sources (e.g., technographics or hiring trends).
* Directly reclaim GTM time by automating "data stitching" and delivering auto\-generated "Account Cheat Sheets" directly into the CRM or Slack.
* Act as the agile executor for the experimental layer of the GTM stack, packaging and documenting successful technical plays for global adoption by the broader RevTech team.

### **What we look for**

* 2–4 years of experience in Revenue Operation, Sales Operations, Growth Engineering, Forward Deployed Engineer.
* Proficiency in Python and SQL — you will write code as needed.
* Strong understanding of API logic and connectivity.
* Working knowledge of Salesforce
* Experience with at least one modern GTM enrichment/orchestration platform (Clay, Cargo, Clearbit, Apollo, ZoomInfo, or similar).
* Demonstrated ability to take a workflow from idea to production — scoping, building, testing, documenting, and iterating.
* Comfort working with data at scale: cleaning, transforming, enriching, and routing contact/account records.


You don't need to tick every box. We strongly encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply. If you are excited about this opportunity but your experience is slightly different, we still want to hear from you!

### **Interview process**

* 30\-minute screening call with a member of our Talent Acquisition team
* 60\-minute Hiring manager interview
* 60\-minute Technical interview

### **Life at Akeneo**

##### **Work Environment**

* **Work\-Life Balance:** Enjoy 25 days of annual leave with flexible working hours, and a hybrid setup allowing 3\-4 days working from home. Option to Work from Anywhere for up to 30 days per year.
* **Home Office \& Commuting Allowance:** Enjoy a $600 budget to enhance your home office and an $80 monthly sustainable transportation allowance for eco\-friendly commuting.

##### **Inclusivity**

* **Generous Parental Leave:** Benefit from 16 weeks of paid maternity leave, 4 weeks of paid leave for the second parent. A gradual return to work program is also available.
* **Community \& Support:** Engage in 2 paid volunteering days annually and join Employee Resource Groups dedicated to promoting diversity and inclusion within the company.

##### **Growth and Development**

* **Professional Development:** Access a $1,000 annual budget for personal professional development and take advantage of career paths, internal mobility opportunities, and a "Women in Leadership Programme."
* **Comprehensive Onboarding:** Start on the right foot with an 8\-week onboarding program.

##### **Wellbeing**

* **Health \& Insurance:** Receive 100% employer contribution for employees and their dependents for medical, dental, and vision benefits up to the set caps.
* **Financial Security:** Benefit from a 401k with a 4% company match and short as well as long\-term disability insurance.
* **Mental Health Support:** Access individual and confidential sessions with a mental health practitioner or coach of your choice.


For more information about benefits, don’t hesitate to contact our Talent Acquisition team.

title: Founding Growth Marketer / GTM Engineer
description:
**About Usul**
--------------


Usul is building the “Amazon for Government”, a world where any company can sell to any government in a few clicks on their computer. Anything from national security tech, space stations, energy infrastructure, healthcare and more.


Our AI platform helps companies identify, pursue, and win the government opportunities they’re most likely to convert and makes it dramatically easier for governments to buy from the private sector.


In 1 year we’ve grown to $5M\+ ARR securing Fortune 500 government contractors, the U.S. government and NATO as customers. We’re now entering the next phase of growth to capture the entire U.S. market and expand to over 60\+ allied nations.

**About the role**
------------------


We’re build a small, elite team with high standards and low ego. We care about doing whatever it takes, getting better at the craft every week, and being genuinely fun to work with. We’re the youngest team in our world by far. We’re in our 20s running around defense conferences in Usul t\-shirts, surrounded by 40 to 60 year olds in suits and military uniforms. People see us as the ambitious AI builders bringing real Silicon Valley energy and modern technology to one of the most traditional industries on earth.


As our lead Founding GTM/Growth Marketer you will be the fuel on the fire to help scale the team to IPO globally. You'll build the systems, campaigns, and experiments that turn Usul's momentum into a growth machine.


What you will be doing:

* Own and continuously optimize Usul's landing pages, conversion flows, and outbound campaigns from strategy to execution
* Lead SEO end\-to\-end: keyword research, programmatic pages, content strategy, and on\-page optimization
* Build the dashboards, systems, and processes that let growth learnings compound over time
* Build and run lifecycle campaigns (email, onboarding, reactivation) to drive activation and retention
* Partner closely with product, design, and engineering to align growth efforts with where the product is heading
* Vibe\-code internal tools and automation to eliminate manual work and move faster

**What we're looking for:**

* 2–5 years in a growth or GTM role at an early\-stage or B2B SaaS startup
* Proven track record owning SEO, landing page optimization, email marketing, and content strategy
* Strong analytical chops: comfortable with funnels, cohorts, and conversion metrics
* Scrappy, high\-ownership operator (you don't wait to be told what to do)
* Comfortable vibe coding experiments without waiting on engineering
* Bias to action, thrives in ambiguity, and genuinely excited about national security and defense tech

### **About the interview**

* Intro Call (15 min)
* Founder Culture Call (15\-30 min) \- In Person if you are in SF!
* GTM Technical (45 mins)
* 2\-3 day Work Trial
* Offer!


Compensation Range: $120K \- $200K

title: GTM Engineer
description:
DISQO’s mission is to build the world’s most trusted ad measurement platform that fuels brand growth.
The world’s largest brands, agencies, and media companies trust DISQO for expert insight and AI\-driven intelligence about their advertising performance across all platforms. We capture people’s sentiments and journeys, connecting them with the brands they value and the media they consume. With this identity\-based approach, brands gain more accurate and authentic insight so they can create more meaningful interactions.  

Joining DISQO Nation means becoming part of a community that champions speed, innovation, and continuous growth. We invest deeply in our talent, empowering our teams to reach their highest potential. Together, we are shaping the future of work at DISQO—defined by performance, purpose, and impact.  

We show up each day with curiosity and ambition, committed to learning, accelerating growth, and making a lasting difference. Grounded in our values and principles, we lead and collaborate to elevate performance, accountability, and excellence at every level of the organization. And through it all, we make sure to have fun along the way.  

The GTM Engineer is a member of the Revenue Operations team responsible for executing on GTM AI \& workflow initiatives with the goal of scaling our outbound prospecting systems and improving the productivity of our Sales, Marketing \& Customer Success teams. We are looking for someone with a GTM (Sales \& Marketing) or operations background who understands the revenue context and can translate this into impactful automation.
### **What you get to do:**

* Build our prospecting architecture \- using our tools such as Clay, Octave, Salesforce to identify high\-intent prospects, build new signals, enrich data, and lead routing.
* Build our outbound architecture \- Align our ICP and Persona with effective messaging to assist our BDR team and other automated outbound and inbound campaigns e.g., marketing advertising segments.
* Improve the productivity of our GTM teams (Sales, Marketing \& Customer Success) by delivering easy\-to\-use agents that automate repetitive tasks, reduce bottlenecks, draft AI\-assisted playbooks to assist key goals (e.g., build pipeline, closing, renewals), and train users on being effective with AI agents.
* Create a measurable framework to pipeline generation by creating strategic automated outbound campaigns, enabling the BDR team, tracking key metrics, and optimizing based on the data.
* Develop prototypes and run pilots in order to discover what works using tools such as A/B or multivariate testing to discover what is working and implementing new approaches and scaling what works.
* Measure impact and ROI by quantifying hours saved, pipeline sourced or influenced, and conversion lifts
### **What you bring to the role:**

* 3\-5\+ years in Sales, Marketing, Operations or GTM role preferably in a B2B environment.
* Demonstrated success deploying GenAI \& workflow tools in the GTM such as lead scoring, intent signals, outbound triggers or creating AI briefs e.g., synthesizing data source information for accounts.
* You are GTM oriented meaning you understand sales and marketing processes and their impact on downstream outcomes.
* Strong data literacy and understanding of data models in GTM tools such as Salesforce, Hubspot or other SaaS tools.
* Cross\-functional operator ability to communicate with a wide\-array of stakeholders in the GTM, IT, engineering or product.
* Nimble and scrappy \- you don’t get stuck on perfection or ambiguity, but comfortable launching MVPs and iterating towards success and scaling.
* Experience working with workflow automation tools such as Clay or n8n.
* Experience creating agents such as Gemini Enterprise.
* Familiarity with GTM tools such as, but not necessarily Salesforce, Clay, Hubspot, Salesloft, Outreach, etc.
### **Nice to have:**

* Experience developing integrations such as APIs or webhooks and managing data waterfalls.
* Ability to vibe code applications with the goal of building out internal GTM apps
\#LI\-MV1  

At DISQO, we pride ourselves on having a positive, performance\-oriented workplace that includes a flexible hybrid approach, competitive medical benefits, and an amazing vacation policy. **Perks \& Benefits:*** 100% covered Medical/Dental/Vision for employee, competitive dependent coverage
* Stock options
* 401K
* Generous PTO policy
* Team offsites, social events \& happy hours
* Life Insurance
* Health FSA
* Commuter FSA (for hybrid employees)
* Catered lunch and fully stocked kitchen
* Paid Maternity/Paternity leave
* Disability Insurance
* Travel Assistance Program
* 24/7 Counseling Services offered to Employees

 ***Note: The benefits noted above are for full time US based employees only.*** **DISQO is an equal opportunity employer. Discovery, innovation, and growth are possible when we open ourselves to new possibilities, perspectives, and approaches. That’s why, at DISQO, we welcome, support, and empower individuals from diverse backgrounds. Exceptional teams are rooted in extraordinary people, each with a unique story and a compelling set of skills. DISQO does not discriminate against employees based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, gender identity or expression, age, disability, pregnancy (including childbirth, breastfeeding, or related medical condition), genetic information, protected military or veteran status, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state or local laws.*** ***Recruiting firms that submit resumes to DISQO without first entering into a written contract will not be entitled to any compensation on candidates referred by that firm.***

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Inventory and POS Revenue Engineer
description:
**Full Stack Engineer – Retail Commerce, Payments, Delivery Integrations \& AI Optimization**

**Location:** Bloomington, IL  
**Job Type:** Full\-Time  
**Experience Level:** Senior / Mid\-Senior  
**Industry:** Retail Technology, Convenience, Gas Station, Liquor Store, Inventory Automation

**About the Role**

We are seeking a highly capable **Full Stack Engineer** to build and scale a next\-generation commerce and operations platform for retail outlets including **convenience stores, gas stations, and liquor stores**. This role will focus on creating integrated systems across **inventory management, card and payment systems, automated delivery\-provider connections (e.g., Uber Eats, DoorDash, Grubhub, Instacart, etc.), pricing optimization, promotions, offers, digital shelf management, and AI\-driven business insights**.

This is a business\-critical engineering role. The systems built in this position will directly influence **revenue growth, margin optimization, pricing accuracy, customer experience, online presence, competitive positioning, and operational efficiency**. Mistakes can materially affect sales, margins, compliance, and customer trust, so we are looking for an engineer with strong technical depth, sound judgment, security discipline, and experience building reliable production systems.

**What You Will Do**

You will design, build, and maintain secure, scalable applications and integrations that help retail businesses operate more intelligently across in\-store and digital channels.

**Core Responsibilities**

* Build full stack applications for **inventory, catalog, pricing, promotions, loyalty, payments, and order orchestration**
* Develop integrations with **delivery and marketplace platforms** such as Uber Eats, DoorDash, Grubhub, Instacart, and similar providers
* Create automated systems to manage and optimize inventory, pricing and promotions
* Design tools to support **card and payment system integrations**, including transaction flows, reconciliation, reporting, and controls
* Build internal dashboards and workflows for operators to manage **product listings, pricing rules, promotions, online availability, and store presence** product mix optimization, in\-store and digital shelf optimization
* Architect APIs and backend services that connect POS, ERP, payment gateways, delivery providers, third\-party data sources, and internal business systems
* Establish engineering standards for testing, deployment, observability, reliability, and secure handling of sensitive business and payment\-related data

**Required Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field
* **2\+ years** of experience in full stack software engineering
* Strong experience building modern web applications across both **frontend and backend**
* Strong experience designing and consuming **REST APIs**, webhooks, event\-driven systems, and third\-party integrations
* Experience with **cloud infrastructure** and production\-grade deployment patterns
* Hands\-on experience with data pipelines, analytics, and systems that support business optimization
* Strong understanding of **security best practices**, authentication/authorization, secrets management, logging, audit trails, and secure data handling
* Ability to assess business impact and engineer systems with high accuracy and reliability

**Technical Skills We Are Looking For**

Candidates should demonstrate strong credentials across several of the following areas:

**Frontend**

* React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript
* Modern UI architecture, state management, responsive design
* Dashboard and admin interface development

**Backend**

* Node.js, Python, Java, Go, or similar backend languages
* API development, microservices, workflow orchestration
* Event\-driven and integration\-heavy architecture

**Databases \& Data**

* PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis
* Data modeling for commerce, inventory, promotions, and analytics
* ETL / ELT pipelines, BI integration, reporting systems

**Cloud / DevOps**

* AWS, GCP, or Azure
* Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD
* Monitoring, logging, performance tuning, reliability engineering

**Integrations**

* POS systems
* Payment gateways / processors
* Delivery platforms / aggregators
* CRM / loyalty / ERP / e\-commerce systems
* Third\-party location, search, and competitor data providers
* Competitor analysis, trend analysis, assortment intelligence

**What Success Looks Like**

In this role, success means building systems that help the business:

* improve sales and gross margin
* optimize pricing and promotions
* reduce inventory mismatches and manual effort
* improve online availability and store presence
* increase order efficiency across delivery channels
* surface faster, smarter insights on customer demand and competitor moves
* operate securely and reliably in high\-impact workflows

**What We’re Looking For in a Candidate**

* Strong product and business sense, not just coding ability
* Excellent judgment in systems that affect revenue, payments, customer trust, and operations
* Ability to work independently and own ambiguous, high\-impact problems
* Strong communication skills with technical and non\-technical stakeholders
* High standards for quality, security, and operational discipline
* Comfortable working in environments where engineering decisions can directly drive growth — or create losses if done poorly

**To Apply**

Please submit your resume along with a brief note describing your skillsets and experience.

Work Location: In person

title: Marketing Automation Engineer
description:
About NCSA College Recruiting
  
NCSA College Recruiting is the world largest college recruiting platform, providing student\-athletes content, tools, coaching and access to a network of 40,000 college coaches across 37 sports. NCSA is an online experience of IMG Academy, the world’s leading sports education brand and one of the Best and Brightest Companies to Work For in the Nation in 2024 and Top Remote Places to Work in 2024\. IMG Academy provides a holistic education model that empowers student\-athletes to win their future, preparing them for college and for life. Additional on\-campus and online experiences include:
  
* Boarding school and camps, via a state\-of\-the\-art campus in Bradenton, Fla.
* Online coaching via IMG Academy\+, with a focus on personal development through the lens of sport and performance


**Position Summary:**  

We are seeking a highly technical Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC) Solutions Architect to own solution design, support data architecture, and technical strategy for our marketing automation ecosystem. This role sits between marketing strategy and engineering, translating complex business requirements into scalable, secure, high\-performing SFMC solutions.
  
This individual will act as the technical authority for Marketing Cloud, providing architectural direction and hands\-on expertise, while leveraging external developers on retainer for complex or urgent build needs.
  
This role is critical to reducing technical friction, improving platform scalability, and enabling smarter, more efficient marketing execution. You’ll help move the organization from reactive builds to intentional, well\-architected solutions — while still getting things shipped.
  
  

**Position Responsibilities:**  

Solution Design \& Architecture
  
* Design scalable, secure, and performant end\-to\-end marketing solutions using Salesforce Marketing Cloud and adjacent Salesforce products.
* Create high\-level and detailed solution designs covering data models, journeys, automation, and integrations.
* Ensure solutions follow SFMC best practices and align with long\-term platform strategy.


Requirements \& Stakeholder Collaboration
  
* Partner with marketing, CRM, data, and product stakeholders to gather and translate complex business requirements into technical solutions.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor, helping teams understand trade\-offs, constraints, and opportunities within SFMC.
* Anticipate future needs and proactively propose architectural improvements.


Technical Leadership
  
* Serve as the technical lead for Marketing Cloud, setting standards, patterns, and best practices.
* Provide guidance and mentorship to internal team members on SFMC capabilities and technical concepts.
* Review and oversee work delivered by external developers to ensure quality and alignment with architecture.


Campaign \& Journey Optimization
  
* Design and optimize customer journeys, segmentation strategies, and personalization frameworks to improve performance and ROI.
* Partner with marketing strategy teams to translate campaign goals into technically sound implementations.
* Balance speed\-to\-market with long\-term maintainability.


Data, Performance \& Scalability
  
* Architect and maintain SFMC data models using Data Extensions and related tooling.
* Design integrations with Salesforce CRM, Data Cloud, and external systems (APIs, SFTP, CDPs).
* Ensure solutions are built to handle large data volumes, frequent automation, and audience growth without degradation.
* Monitor and address performance, stability, and data hygiene issues.


Technical Environment
  
* Salesforce Marketing Cloud (Journey Builder, Email Studio, Automation Studio, Contact Builder)
* Salesforce Data Cloud
* Salesforce CRM integrations
* SQL, AMPscript
* APIs, data feeds, and automation frameworks


**Knowledge, Skills and Abilities:**  

* Deep expertise in Salesforce Marketing Cloud architecture and implementation.
* Strong technical proficiency in SQL and AMPscript.
* Hands\-on experience designing journeys, automations, and complex data models.
* Experience integrating SFMC with Salesforce CRM and external systems.
* Ability to balance strategic architecture with pragmatic execution.
* Excellent communication skills — able to explain technical concepts to non\-technical stakeholders.


**Preferred Skills:**  

* Experience with Salesforce Data Cloud or other CDPs.
* Experience operating in environments with external development partners or agencies.
* Familiarity with enterprise\-scale marketing operations and governance.
* Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Engagement Administrator
* Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Email Specialist
* Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Engagement Developer


**Background Requirements:**  

* Requires a background check upon offer


**Benefits:**  

As a full\-time member of our team, you will enjoy a comprehensive offering listed below. Connect with your talent acquisition specialist to learn more about benefits for our part\-time roles.
  
* Comprehensive Medical, Dental and Vision
* Flexible Spending Account and Health Savings Account options
* 401k with an Employer Match
* Short Term and Long Term Disability
* Group and Supplemental Life \& AD\&D
* Gym Discount Program
* Pet Insurance
* Wellbeing Program
* and more!


Don’t meet every single requirement? We are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive, authentic workplace, so if you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.
  
  

**Get to know us better:**  

www.ncsasports.org
  
www.ncsasports.org/careers

title: Lead Growth Engineer
description:
**Lead Growth Engineer**


**The Opportunity**



Seamless is hiring a **Lead Growth Engineer** to help make the product itself the primary driver of adoption, expansion, and revenue.



This is a **senior, high\-ownership role** at the intersection of engineering, product, and growth. In this role, you will identify opportunities to improve the customer experience, design experiments, ship product improvements, and measure the results.



Your work will **directly influence activation, retention, and monetization** by improving onboarding, simplifying workflows, and creating natural upgrade opportunities within the product experience.


**This is a founding role within growth engineering at Seamless.** You will help establish how experimentation, product instrumentation, and growth\-driven product development operate across the platform. As the function grows, **this role is expected to evolve into a technical leadership position.**



You will report to the **Head of Product Led Growth** and work closely with engineering, product, and data teams to **turn growth ideas into shipped product improvements.**


**Responsibilities**


* Design and implement onboarding experiences that help new users reach meaningful product value quickly
* Build and optimize core product workflows that increase repeat usage and habit formation
* Identify opportunities to improve activation, engagement, and retention using product data and user behavior insights
* Generate and execute product experiments to test improvements to the customer journey
* Ship experiments frequently and iterate quickly based on real user behavior and data insights
* Own growth initiatives end\-to\-end, from hypothesis creation through deployment and measurement
* Implement and maintain experimentation infrastructure including feature flags and product instrumentation
* Use product analytics to evaluate experiment outcomes and identify new opportunities for improvement
* Simplify complex workflows through automation, guided interactions, and thoughtful defaults
* Help establish scalable engineering patterns and experimentation practices that support long\-term product\-led growth


**Skillset**


* **Senior full\-stack engineering experience**, ideally with a frontend focus on user\-facing systems
* Strong experience building production applications using **React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL**
* Proven ability to improve onboarding, activation, retention, or other self\-serve product experiences
* Experience designing and running product experiments including **A/B testing and feature flag implementations**
* Familiarity with analytics and experimentation platforms such as **Amplitude** and **GrowthBook** (or similar tools)
* Strong product instincts and ability to reason about user behavior, growth loops, and product usage patterns
* Ability to translate product hypotheses into technical experiments quickly and iteratively
* Strong data\-driven mindset with the ability to evaluate experiment outcomes and guide product decisions
* Comfortable operating in a fast\-moving environment where experimentation and rapid iteration are core to product development


**Our Tech Stack**



Broadly, we use a **modern JavaScript and cloud\-based stack** designed for rapid product iteration, experimentation, and data\-driven development. It's not a requirement to have worked with every tool in this stack, but the more the better.


* **Node.js backend** services
* **React frontend** using styled\-components
* **PostgreSQL** as our primary application database
* **AWS infrastructure** including **EC2** and **Lambda**
* **GrowthBook** for feature flagging and product experimentation
* **Amplitude** for frontend and backend product analytics
* **Rollbar** for error monitoring
* **AWS CloudWatch** for system logging and operational monitoring
* **GitHub Actions** for **CI/CD** and automated deployments


**Education \& Requirements**


* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent professional experience
* 5\+ years of experience in software engineering or full\-stack development
* Experience building user\-facing B2B SaaS applications
* Experience working with product experimentation or product analytics platforms preferred
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills with a data\-first approach


**About Seamless:**



Since 2015, Seamless.AI has helped sales teams maximize revenue with the world's first real\-time B2B search engine. As one of Ohio's fastest\-growing companies, we've earned top industry accolades, including G2's 2025 Best Software Products (\#1 Highest Satisfaction Product), Purpose Jobs' 2024 Best Places to Work, and LinkedIn's Top 50 Tech Startups (2020, 2022, 2023\).



We are committed to a diverse, inclusive workplace and do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, or other protected statuses. Visa sponsorship is not available; applicants must be authorized to work in the U.S.

title: Lead GTM Engineer
description:
We're hiring a **Lead GTM Engineer** to build and run our multi\-channel outbound infrastructure.


### **Summary**


* **Flexible Title:** Can tailor to reflect your skills \& experience — from GTM Engineer to RevOps Lead or Outbound Pipeline Architect.
* **Flexible Time:** Can do full\-time, part\-time, side\-gig (off\-hours), or fractional (contract).
* **Flexible Commitment:** Can do short\-term, long\-term, or intermittent.


**Why so flexible?** We're a FUNDED startup racing to launch end of Q2 2026\. That gives us the coming months to stack features while raising additional working capital. Feel free to jump in, help us ship, then bounce \>\> or stick around. A successful launch translates into lots of permanent jobs for those that want them. We're also interested in long\-term "side gig" relationships — in our experience, a few expert hours often beat full\-time learning\-curve hours.


### **About Us**


We're a credible, funded, remote\-first startup led by a serial technical founder, backed by a 20\-person team. The product is live in private alpha. Learn more about our founder, team, and comp structures at **list\-lab.org**.


### **About The Role**


This is the lead tactical role for our outbound engine — hands\-on execution driven by the strategy you help set. AI is central to how we personalize and automate outreach at scale.


We have some early testing data and infrastructure in place. You build and iterate: consolidate email ops, LinkedIn automation, Facebook/social outreach, and manual community efforts under one owner. You're in the tools every day — integrating CRM, outreach tools, enrichment, and analytics into a unified workflow; owning domain health, deliverability, sequences, and dashboards; creating the playbooks and reporting structure as you go. Day one you're doing the work yourself. You may coordinate vendors or specialists later, but if your instinct is to delegate and manage — this isn't the right fit.


**Tech stack:** Tools like Apollo, Clay, Phantom Buster, Instantly, Lemlist, Dripify, Drippi.ai, Warmy.io, GoHighLevel, SendGrid, Zapier, Make, n8n, HubSpot (or Pipedrive), AI tools for personalization/automation, and domain warmup/deliverability — you'll help define our ideal stack.


### **Compensation**


Up to **$350,000** max total annual compensation in Tier 1 cities; cash and equity components to be negotiated (amount reflects combined cash and equity components).


### **What Success Looks Like in 30 Days**


* Multi\-channel outreach pipeline mapped and live — email, LinkedIn, and at least one other channel (Facebook, social DMs, or community)
* GTM stack connected: CRM, outreach tools, enrichment, and analytics wired into a unified workflow
* Domain health and deliverability under control; sequences running with clear reporting on opens, replies, and meetings booked
* Dashboards in place so we can see what's working and what's stuck
* Early experiments producing data; you're iterating on copy, sequences, and targeting


### **What You'll Do**


* **Build and run the outreach machine** — design and implement systems that move leads from first touch to qualified handoff via direct outreach
* **Orchestrate multi\-channel sequences** — email, LinkedIn, Facebook/social DMs; build flows that feel personal at scale
* **Connect the stack** — integrate CRM, outreach tools (Instantly, Lemlist, Dripify, Drippi.ai, Warmy.io, Apollo), enrichment (Clay), automation (Zapier, Make, Phantom Buster), and analytics
* **Own email infrastructure** — domain warmup, deliverability, list hygiene, and sequence iteration
* **Run LinkedIn and Facebook automation** — configure tools, avoid platform violations, vary copy and cadence with AI
* **Track and report** — build dashboards, measure by channel, identify bottlenecks, iterate fast
* **Document and systematize** — create playbooks so the process scales beyond you
* **Optionally coordinate** — vendors or specialists as the motion matures (nice\-to\-have, not day\-one expectation)


### **What We're Looking For**


**Must\-haves:**


* **Hands\-on, tactical execution** — you build and run the systems; you're in the tools, not advising from the sidelines. Comfort researching and planning to execute on email, LinkedIn, and Facebook/social channels — even if you haven't run them all.
* **AI exposure** — you use or have used AI for personalization, automation, or copy variation
* **Willingness to learn, test, and try** — fast iteration: hypothesis experiment data decision, in days not weeks
* **Technical proficiency** with the GTM stack — you've built with these or similar and can help define our ideal stack
* **Multi\-channel outbound experience** — email, LinkedIn, or social DMs at scale
* **Systems thinker** — you see the whole outreach pipeline and connect the pieces


**Nice\-to\-have:**


* Experience **leading or coordinating** other GTM operators, SDRs, or vendors
* Venture\-backed startup experience

title: GTM Engineer
description:
I’m Cole, Head of Demand Generation at Plain. We’re redefining customer support for the next generation of B2B companies. We’re building the fastest, most powerful platform to help companies move beyond reactive support and build true customer relationships.


Some of the world’s most forward\-thinking companies, like Cursor, Ashby, and Sanity, trust Plain to unify all customer interactions, enable faster team collaboration, and supercharge their workflows with AI.


We’re a small, tight\-knit crew with offices in SF and London. This role is hybrid with 3 days a week in our SF office.

**Why this role is special**
----------------------------


B2B customer support is undergoing a seismic shift. AI is transforming the way companies engage with customers, shifting support from a siloed function to a company\-wide effort across Slack, Discord, and in\-product experiences.


Plain is leading the charge in building this new world, and the GTM Engineer owns how we turn that vision into pipeline across paid, outbound, and content. You'll have real budget, real autonomy, and a major finger on the scale of revenue.


You'll be one of the first hires on a GTM team we're building from scratch. The vision is a small, technical, high\-output team that treats marketing like a product: instrumented, iterative, and AI\-native.

**What you’ll do**
------------------


You’ll spend 100% of your time generating pipeline with minimal guardrails and a lot of room to experiment.


Day to day, you will:

* Build and scale repeatable signal\-based outbound to generate net\-new pipeline through experimentation and optimizations.
* Create LLM\-powered content that ranks highly in SEO and AI search (we call this Generative Engine Optimization aka GEO).
* Report on successes and improvements with constant iteration.
* Write copy that converts — landing pages, ads, and emails that feel like they were written by someone who actually understands the product and buyer.
* Instrument everything so we know what’s working (and what’s not), and use that feedback loop to ship better, faster.

**This is a great fit if you…**
-------------------------------

* You have strong sales acumen and write copy that converts (without AI) \- landing pages, ads, and emails that feel like they were written by someone who understands the product and buyer.
* You’ve been testing and honing your skills with the latest AI and workflow automation tools (n8n, Unify, Claude Code, Clay, Instantly, etc.)
* Have a builder mentality and care more about what we can ship this week than a perfect Q4 plan.
* Are a little technical and very curious — comfortable with APIs, light coding, and connecting systems to unlock new GTM motions.
* Are an obsessive experimenter who is happiest when testing, iterating, and letting results guide your time and energy.

**This won’t be the right role for you if you…**
------------------------------------------------

* Need a detailed playbook handed to you instead of helping write it. We’ve had success, but are very much an early stage company looking for creativity and differentiation.
* Optimize for process over output.
* Prefer "big company" environments over fast\-moving, hands\-on work.


The salary range for the role is $150k \- $180k \+ equity. The salary range shown is intentionally broad to reflect the range of skills and levels that we are open to for this role. Your placement within in the salary range will be decided upon completion of the interview process, taking into account factors like your demonstrated skills, and the depth of your experience. Our Recruiting team will be able to provide more details during the interview process.

  

Compensation Range: $150K \- $180K

title: Digital Growth Engineer - Headquarters - Edina, MN
description:
Description:

EVEREVE inspires women to move forward in their fashion and in their lives by offering modern, curated pieces—along with expert styling—to ensure women feel confidently put together. Our 100\+ stores, booming e\-commerce business and a fast\-growing subscription box service, Trendsend, reach over one million customers every year.

  

Living our core values and treating everyone with HEART (humility, empathy, authenticity, relationships, tenacity) creates a shared purpose and collaborative community—and it's also a key part of our success. Join our team to help shape the future of an ever\-growing, ever\-evolving brand!

**About the Role:**


We are looking for a **Digital Growth Engineer** who is part growth hacker, data analyst, and digital marketer with a love for the technical aspects that glue it all together. This role is role is a critical component to informing, measuring and contributing to the growth of our ecommerce channel and digital styling initiatives. This individual is part growth hacker, data analyst and digital marketer with a love for the technical aspects that glue it all together.


In partnership with our marketing, content and development teams, you’ll connect a focus on customer acquisition, retention and conversion to help optimize our growth, including hacks and tactics for increasing average order size, using email marketing and social networks, and improving SEO. You’ll also bring your data\-driven curiosity to measure and report on key metrics and recommend improvements.

**Responsibilities:**

* **Performance Analytics \& Dashboards:** Deliver monthly performance analytics and build automated dashboards (using tools like Google Data Studio or PowerBI) to track and report on key metrics.
* **Advanced Data Integration:** Use Python, SQL, or similar development tools to extract, transform, and integrate internal data with third\-party services and partners.
* **Deep\-Funnel Attribution:** Implement and manage attribution models to track performance across paid and organic channels, potentially leveraging BigQuery to join marketing data with internal sales data to track ROI to the last dollar.
* **Technical SEO Automation:** Partner with ecommerce teams to suggest onsite SEO improvements, utilizing automated scraping or data libraries (Numpy, Pandas) to identify growth opportunities and analyze competitor intent signals.
* **Full\-Cycle Experimentation:** Execute growth tactics and measurement through rigorous A/B testing and conversion rate optimization (CRO).
* **Tag \& Pixel Management:** Configure and manage Google Tag Manager to handle marketing pixels and complex code integrations across multiple environments.
* **Predictive Insights:** Bring a "data\-geek" mentality to analyze Customer Lifetime Value (LTV) and use data\-driven curiosity to recommend proactive improvements.
* **Cross\-Functional Partnership:** Partner with marketing, content, and development teams to optimize customer acquisition, retention, and average order size.
* **Vendor Management:** Manage relationships with third\-party technology vendors supporting email, reviews, and user\-generated content.


Requirements:
* **3–5 years** in a growth marketing or similar role with hands\-on full\-cycle experience.
* **Expert\-level GTM \& Analytics:** Proven ability to configure Google Analytics and Tag Manager in a Shopify\-centric environment.
* **Technical Stack:** Proficiency in Python and SQL for data manipulation and integration.
* **Growth Tools:** Experience using tools like Klaviyo, Ahrefs, BigQuery and A/B testing tools to analyze and suggest site improvements.
* **Strategic Mindset:** Experienced in leveraging buyer intent signals and "outside the box" hyper\-growth strategies to prospect and retain customers.

**Salary:** $135\-145K \+ bonus

**Evereve Benefits and Perks:**

* **Self\-Managed PTO:** Time off is yours to plan and use as you need it
* **Affordable Health Insurance:** 80% employer\-paid premiums for medical and dental for team members; 50% covered for eligible partners, spouses and dependents
* **Profit Sharing Bonus:** Paid quarterly based on company performance
* **Parental Leave:** Generous paid leave benefits for maternity, paternity and adoption to enjoy time with your growing family
* **Flex Spending Accounts:** Benefit from pre\-tax savings for out\-of\-pocket healthcare or dependent/daycare costs
* **Additional Insurance:** Company paid short\-term disability and life insurance
* **401k \+ 5% Match:** Contribute to your financial future and receive a 5% company match with immediate vesting upon enrollment
* **Fashion Discount:** Enjoy a 30% discount on all Evereve product when you shop in our stores
* **Flexible Work Model:** Offers work from home flexibility with (3 or 4\)\-day in\-office presence to build connection with team members
* **Culture of Purpose:** Experience a culture of purpose rooted in our HEART Values – Humility, Empathy, Authenticity, Relationship and Tenacity

title: AI Systems/Digital Growth Engineer
description:
**Lifecykel US** \| Remote/Hybrid (US\-based)

**About Lifecykel**

Lifecykel is a high\-performance wellness brand revolutionizing functional mushroom supplements. With 300,000\+ happy customers worldwide and 19,000\+ 5\-star reviews, we're known for science\-backed, premium mushroom extracts that support focus, energy, immunity, sleep, and longevity. We're ambitious, fast\-growing, and ready to expand in the US market through cutting\-edge digital innovation.

**The Role**

We're looking for an **AI systems/Digital Growth Engineer** who lives and breathes emerging technology and isn't afraid to experiment boldly. You'll be the architect of our digital expansion—integrating AI systems, optimizing our SEO/GEO presence, and using innovative tactics to drive aggressive growth. This isn't a "play it safe" role. We want someone who can spot the next wave before it hits and turn it into revenue.

**What You'll Do**

**AI \& Emerging Tech Integration**

* Implement and optimize AI\-powered tools for content creation, customer personalization, predictive analytics, and automation across our digital ecosystem
* Stay ahead of the curve on generative AI, machine learning applications, and voice search optimization
* Test and deploy emerging technologies (AR/VR experiences, AI chatbots, predictive modeling) to enhance customer journey and conversion

**SEO \& Geo\-Optimization**

* Own our organic search strategy—drive traffic and rankings through technical SEO, on\-page optimization, and content strategy
* Leverage AI tools for keyword research, competitive analysis, and content gap identification
* Optimize local/geo\-targeting strategies to dominate regional markets across the US

* Knowledge of programmatic SEO, zero\-click optimization, or AI\-generated content strategies

**Who You Are**

* **Integration specialist:** you are able to quickly take ideas on board to test, learn, and iterate

**Why Join Lifecykel?**

Pay: $97,005\.40 \- $116,823\.71 per year

title: Founding GTM Engineer
description:
**About HUD**
-------------


HUD (YC W25\) does RL and evaluations for frontier AI agents. Our HUD agentic RL platform is used by frontier labs, Fortune 500 companies and startups. We have grown revenue and raised funding from YC, A16Z and other leading VCs to scale fast.

**About the role**
------------------


HUD's product sells itself to the right person — the problem is finding them.


Our buyers are ML engineers, AI researchers, and engineering leaders at frontier labs and enterprises. They don't respond to generic SaaS outreach. They respond to someone who understands what they're building, why their current eval pipeline is broken, and how HUD fixes it. Someone who can have a real technical conversation, then follow up relentlessly until the deal closes.


We're looking for a **GTM Engineer** who can own HUD's go\-to\-market motion. You'll build the pipeline, run the outreach, and close the meetings — but you'll also build the *systems* that make this scalable. You know the tools: CRMs, sequencing platforms, enrichment APIs, custom scrapers. You can vibe code a scraper in the morning and close a meeting with a VP of Engineering in the afternoon.


The best person for this role understands sales pipelines deeply, picks up new businesses *fast*, and can articulate what HUD does to a technical buyer within a week of joining. You're not just running playbooks — you're building them.


This is not a “send 500 cold emails and hope” role. It's a “figure out which 50 people to reach, write something that makes them reply, and build a system that does this every week” role.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Own HUD's outbound pipeline end\-to\-end: targeting, enrichment, outreach, follow\-up, and meeting booking
* Build and maintain outbound infrastructure — email sequencing, CRM automation, lead scoring, custom tooling
* Develop messaging that resonates with technical buyers (ML engineers, AI researchers, engineering leaders) and iterate on it weekly
* Quickly learn new prospect businesses and industries — understand their pain points, workflows, and why HUD matters to them
* Use AI tools aggressively to 10x your output — vibe code scrapers, automate workflows, build internal tools
* Track pipeline metrics and optimize conversion at every stage
* Work closely with founders to develop and refine HUD's GTM playbook as we scale
* Manage inbound lead qualification and pipeline development alongside outbound

**Skills \& Experience**
------------------------

* Demonstrated ability to build and run a GTM motion — outbound pipeline, cold outreach, pipeline development — with real, measurable results
* Technical fluency: comfort on the command line, ability to vibe code, and deep familiarity with GTM tooling (CRMs, sequencing platforms, enrichment tools, data scrapers)
* Ability to understand new businesses and technical products very quickly — you can go from “never heard of it” to “can pitch it to an engineer” in days
* Strong written communication — you write outreach that technical people actually respond to
* Relentless follow\-up discipline — most deals aren't won on the first touch
* Self\-starter who can operate with minimal direction in a fast\-paced startup

**Strong candidates may also have:**

* Experience selling developer tools, infrastructure, or ML/AI products
* History of building outbound systems using tools like Clay, Apollo, or custom automation
* Technical background (CS degree, previous engineering role, or significant side projects)
* Startup experience — you've built something from zero before, or operated in an environment where you had to
* Familiarity with the AI/ML ecosystem — you know what evals are, what RL is, and why researchers care
* Evidence of creative, high\-leverage approaches to pipeline generation

*We care about demonstrated output over credentials. If you've built and scaled a GTM motion — even a scrappy one — and can show the numbers, we want to talk to you.*

**Team \& Company Details**
---------------------------

* **Team Size:** \~15 people currently, mostly full\-time in\-person, but some remote
* **Our team:** Includes 4 international Olympiad medallists (IOI, ILO, IPhO), serial AI startup founders, and researchers with publications at ICLR, NeurIPS, etc
* **Company stage:** Tens of millions in venture funding plus strong revenue growth. Scaling profitably and fast to meet demand

**Logistics**
-------------

* **Employment:** Full\-time
* **Location:** On\-site only (for now) — San Francisco Bay Area
* **Visa Sponsorship:** We provide support for relocation and visas for strong full\-time candidates
* **Timeline:** Rolling applications. Process includes 2 interviews and a 1\-week work trial

**Unlimited access to tokens**
------------------------------

* You will have **unlimited access\*** to API credits for leading providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Cursor, etc.
* By unlimited, we mean no one on our token usage leaderboard has ever hit a limit. So we have no idea what the limit is.


Due to high volume, we may not actively respond to every application, but feel free to contact us at **recruiting@hud.so** or elsewhere if we missed your application.


If you want, I can also quickly give you a **YC Work at a Startup–optimized version** (slightly shorter \+ tuned for applicants) — it tends to convert better for GTM roles.

title: GTM Engineer Intern (Chicago)
description:
LogicGate® is the leading AI GRC platform for the Enterprise, helping governance, risk, and compliance teams limit surprises, strengthen resilience, augment program performance, and confidently quantify impact and business value. Built to provide a centralized view of risk and compliance, with AI intelligence woven into the platform's core, LogicGate delivers real\-time insights and actionable data to help drive current business decisions, with the flexibility to scale alongside evolving business needs. Recognized as a Leader in the GRC Market, LogicGate continues to further solidify its position as a best\-in\-class platform.



At LogicGate, our people are the foundation of everything we do. We are committed to delivering an exceptional experience for our employees and our customers by empowering and enabling our people to take ownership, make an impact, and deliver their best work.

**The Role**



(Based in Chicago)



We're looking for a curious, technically\-minded undergrad or recent grad to join our Growth Marketing team as a GTM Engineer Intern for the Summer 2026\. This is not a traditional sales development or marketing internship. You'll be embedded with our growth team to design, build, and ship AI\-powered tools and automations that directly impact pipeline generation and sales productivity.



The capstone of this internship is building a working AI SDR — an AI\-powered agent that can research prospects, personalize outreach, and integrate into our sales workflow. Along the way, you'll work hands\-on with some of the most exciting tools in the modern GTM stack.



How you'll spend your time:


* Design and build an AI SDR prototype using a combination or LLM APIs (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) and low code tools that automates personalized prospect research and outreach generation
* Build and maintain automations and workflows to connect marketing and sales systems
* Experiment with vibe\-coding, AI agents, and/or prompt engineering to improve lead qualification and GTM orchestration
* Collaborate with the Growth Marketing, Revenue Operations, and Sales teams to identify automation opportunities and reduce manual GTM work
* Document your builds, workflows, and findings so the team can iterate after the summer


**What We're Looking For**



Required


* Currently pursuing a bachelor's degree (junior or senior) in Computer Science, Information Systems, Marketing Technology, or a related field
* Comfortable working with APIs — you've used Postman, written API calls in Python or JavaScript, or connected apps via REST
* Familiarity with LLM (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) beyond just chatting — you've explored prompting, chaining, or building something with one
* Strong curiosity and a bias for building — you don't wait to be told how something works
* Ability to work hybrid out of our Chicago HQ


**Nice to Have**


* Prior experience with Clay, Zapier, n8n, or similar automation/enrichment tools
* Exposure to Salesforce (any capacity)
* Experience building a personal project, hackathon entry, or side tool using AI/LLMs
* Interest in B2B SaaS, GRC, or revenue operations


**What You'll Walk Away With**


* A shipped AI SDR prototype you can demo and put in your portfolio
* Hands\-on experience with the modern GTM tech stack.
* Mentorship from an experienced growth marketing, revenue operations, and sales leader in the B2B SaaS space
* Real ownership — you'll present your work to the broader GTM team at the end of the program
* A front\-row seat to how a high\-growth GRC SaaS company goes to market


**Program Details:**


* 12\-week internship starting on June 1, 2026 through August 28, 2026


*Note: the exact end date is flexible and will be discussed during the interview process*


* We offer competitive, market\-anchored pay for our interns. The anticipated hourly rate for this role is $40/hr.
* Interns are expected to work from our office located in downtown Chicago (River North), 2\-4 days per week
* Gain meaningful work experience in the field of study and participate in special projects.
* Take part in Internship Program activities, including social events, development workshops, networking with company leaders, and more!
* Assigned to a mentor to guide you throughout your internship and beyond!


**Program Eligibility:**


* You are enrolled full time in an accredited college or university as a Junior or Senior or have recently graduated within the past 6 months with your Undergraduate Degree.
* Are available to work 40 hours per week during the summer.
* This position is not eligible for sponsorship.


**Our Culture**



At LogicGate, our culture and employee experience are grounded in our core values of Be as One, Do the Right Thing, Embrace Curiosity, Own It, Empower Customers, and Raise the Bar, which guide how we show up \- for each other, our customers, and all we interact with.



We believe that the strongest teams are made up of individuals who bring their different identities, experiences, and perspectives to the table. We are committed to fostering an inclusive work environment where all employees' differences are celebrated and everyone is encouraged to bring their authentic selves to work.



We encourage everyone to join one of our Employee Resource Groups (AAPI @ LogicGate, Pride at LogicGate, and Women in LogicGate) to participate in and contribute to conversations that foster an inclusive culture.



LogicGate also believes strongly in giving back to the communities in which we live and work. To enable our teams to give back, we offer paid volunteer hours and company\-wide charitable activities supporting a variety of organizations and causes.



We are proud to have been recognized as a top workplace by Built In, Crain's Chicago Business, the Chicago Tribune, and more. Visit our website to learn about our latest recognition.



Learn more about our culture here.


**Excited about LogicGate but not familiar with GRC?**


* GRC stands for Governance, Risk, and Compliance
* GRC professionals help their companies manage uncertainty, act with integrity, and stay on the right side of the law.
* The GRC market is rapidly expanding with continuous growth opportunities. The current market size was valued at $50\.5 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $104\.5 billion by 2031\.

title: GTM Engineer - US
description:
**About Us**


Perk (formerly TravelPerk) is the intelligent platform for travel and spend management. Built to tackle the time\-consuming, manual work that gets in the way of real work, our tools automate everything from travel bookings to expenses, invoice processing, and more. By eliminating this shadow work that wastes hours, erodes morale, and saps innovation, we’re on a mission to power real work, with real impact.


We’re trusted by more than 10,000 companies worldwide, including Wise, On Running, Breitling, and Fabletics, and we’re tackling the 7 hours of lost productivity per employee each week, a $1\.7 trillion problem.


Founded in 2015, Perk has grown into a global company of more than 1,800 people across 12 offices globally, with headquarters in London and Boston. We combine innovation, control, and simplicity to transform how businesses work and how people feel at work.


At Perk, we’re driven by our values, like being an owner, delivering a 7\-star experience, and working as one team. We value curiosity, purpose, and mindset, not just knowledge, to unlock the power in your potential. Our talent team brings together leading minds from the travel and SaaS industries, representing over 70 countries. If you’re excited about having a real impact and shaping how millions of people experience work, we’d love you on the team.


Visit www.perk.com to learn more.

**The Role:**


At Perk, we are actively building a modern, scalable outbound and pipeline generation motion in close partnership with Sales and Marketing leadership.


The Revenue Systems and GTM Engineering function is driving this transformation by combining data, systems, and process enablement to help revenue teams perform at their best. As AI and automation continue to reshape B2B sales, our focus is on applying these capabilities pragmatically \- enhancing human execution with reliable systems, high\-quality data, and repeatable workflows.


The NAM GTM Engineer is a hands\-on technical and operational role within the Revenue Systems team. This position provides **local execution and systems support** for NAM Sales teams, ensuring outbound workflows, account and contact data, and sales productivity tools operate reliably during core business hours. The role reports to the Senior Manager, Revenue Systems Team and works closely with the central GTM Engineering team, Revenue Operations, and Sales leadership.


With significant expectations for pipeline generation and scale, this role offers the opportunity to have a direct, visible impact on how Perk builds, operates, and continuously improves its commercial engine \- while staying closely aligned with global standards and strategy.**What**

**You Will Do:**

**GTM Systems \& Enablement**

* Support, configure, and maintain GTM systems and workflows, including Salesforce, Outreach, Gong, and Clay.
* Ensure reliable system performance during NAM business hours to support high\-volume outbound activity and pipeline generation.

**Data Quality \& Enrichment Support**

* Maintain accurate and complete account and contact data across Salesforce and connected GTM tools.
* Support TAM sourcing, enrichment, and hygiene workflows to ensure sales teams can operate at peak efficiency.

**Sales Productivity \& Automation**

* Partner with NAM Sales teams to achieve aggressive productivity targets, including high\-volume dialing and automated outbound campaigns.
* Rapidly troubleshoot system or workflow issues to prevent lost selling time.

**Operational Support \& Iteration**

* Provide on\-the\-ground systems support to resolve issues without waiting for Europe\-based teams.
* Enable faster iteration of GTM processes while maintaining alignment with global standards.

**Cross\-Functional Collaboration**

* Serve as the primary NAM contact for Revenue Systems and GTM Engineering support.
* Coordinate with central teams to share learnings, improvements, and best practices globally.

**Roadmap Execution**

* Execute against the Revenue Systems and GTM Engineering roadmap in partnership with the Senior Manager of Revenue Systems Team and central GTM Engineer.
* Provide NAM\-specific feedback to inform prioritization, operational improvements, and continuous enhancement of GTM systems.

 **What You Will Need**

* 5\+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or related technical roles in a B2B SaaS environment.
* Hands\-on experience supporting GTM workflows, CRM tools, and revenue systems (Salesforce preferred).
* Experience with sales engagement platforms (Outreach, SalesLoft) and other revenue tools (Gong, Clay, or similar).
* Proven ability to troubleshoot systems, automate workflows, and maintain high data quality to support high\-volume sales activity.
* Strong collaboration and communication skills, able to translate technical concepts into actionable business solutions.
* Comfortable managing competing priorities in a fast\-paced environment and supporting ambitious productivity targets.

**Benefits:**

* Receive competitive compensation and equity ownership in Perk
* Rest and recharge with our generous allocation of 20 vacation days and 12 public holidays
* Enjoy the flexibility of three medical plans to choose from, with company contributions and an HSA when enrolling in an HDHP medical plan
* Take control of your physical health with additional comprehensive benefit plans, covering dental, vision and Wellhub’s gym subscription from your start date
* Rest assured that you’re covered by life and disability policies from your start date, with options to add extra protection through voluntary buy\-up plans
* Plan for your future with our 401(k) plan with company matching contributions
* Care for your furry friends through partner discounts on pet insurance
* Join our unforgettable Perk events, including our spectacular annual summer party
* Always feel supported with Spring Health, our market\-leading wellbeing partner, providing fast, comprehensive access to 12x therapy and 12x coaching sessions for you and your loved ones
* Focus on your family with 12\-16 weeks’ paid parental leave
* Contribute to your community with 16 paid hours per year to spend volunteering for your dearest charitable causes
* Broaden your horizons with up to 20 "Work from Anywhere" days per year
* Follow your passions and take a four\-week, fully paid sabbatical once you reach 5 years
* Let us help you move to one of our hubs with relocation support

**Compensation:**


Compensation for this role is a combination of salary and stock options. The anticipated base salary range is $136,000 \- $160,000 per year. Actual compensation may vary based on specific qualifications, experience, and other job\-related factors


**How We Work**


At Perk, we take an IRL\-first approach to work, where our team works together in\-person 3 days a week. As such, this role requires you to be based within commuting distance of our hubs. We fundamentally believe in the value of meeting in real life to improve connectivity, productivity, creativity and ultimately making us a great place to work.


For certain roles, we can help with relocation from anywhere in the world, English is the official language at the office. Please submit your resume in English if you choose to apply. Do not forget to submit an updated portfolio and/or resume.


Perk is a global company with a diverse customer base, and we want to make sure the people behind our product reflect that. We’re an equal opportunity employer, which means you’re welcome at Perk regardless of how you look, where you’re from, or anything else that makes you, well, you.

**Protect Yourself from Recruitment Scams**


All official communication from Perk will always come from email addresses ending in @perk.com or @externalperk.com, our verified social media channels, or recruiters listed on our official LinkedIn page. We will never ask you to pay for equipment, training, or fees, request sensitive personal information such as bank details early in the process, or communicate through unofficial apps like WhatsApp, Telegram, or Signal. If you receive a message claiming to be from Perk that seems suspicious, please do not respond. Forward it to security \[at] perk .com, and we will confirm whether it is legitimate.


Compensation Range: $136K \- $160K
