title: Director, GTM Automation & Lifecycle Systems
description:
**Director, Automation and Lifecycle Systems**

*Full\-time*

*Remote within the U.S.*

*Exempt*

  

At Ignite Visibility, we’re on a mission to revolutionize national\-to\-local digital marketing. As an award\-winning, fast\-growing agency, we pride ourselves on innovation, collaboration, and excellence. We’re looking for a disciplined, results\-driven leader to build the systems that power how our marketing converts interest into revenue.


We need a visionary who can influence stakeholders and deliver measurable results at scale—all while managing a high\-performing automation ecosystem. You will not simply manage marketing automation; you will design the technical architecture of our revenue engine.

**The Role**


This position sits at the intersection of lifecycle marketing, marketing automation, data architecture, and AI\-driven automation. You will move beyond traditional nurture campaigns to build a modern growth engine that utilizes integrations and AI\-powered workflows to directly improve marketing efficiency and revenue performance.

**What You’ll Do**

* Own Lifecycle Growth Systems: Design and operate the architecture driving engagement across lead capture, multi\-channel nurture, product adoption, and retention.
* Scale Marketing Automation: Architect and implement Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC) and Salesforce Data Cloud.
* Architect Data Flows: Design schemas for lifecycle marketing, manage customer identity resolution, and ensure multi\-touch attribution and revenue feedback loops function properly.
* Build AI\-Driven Workflows: Lead the development of automation\-first systems, including predictive engagement models and intelligent lead routing.
* Technical Integration: Build and manage API\-based integrations (e.g., Zapier) across the GTM stack to trigger automation.

**What We’re Looking For**

* Experience: 7\+ years in lifecycle marketing, automation, or RevOps.
* Technical Expertise: Recent, hands\-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud data platforms and a strong Salesforce CRM background.
* Integration Skills: Proficiency in API integrations and middleware like Zapier to connect disparate GTM tools.
* Strategic Execution: Ability to design multi\-touch programs and scalable architecture that connects marketing data to revenue outcomes.
* Data\-Driven Mindset: A deeply analytical professional who uses data schemas and event tracking to ensure every lifecycle program is measurable and tied to ROI.
* Soft Skills: We value a curious, autonomous self\-starter with an "automation\-first" mindset and a passion for AI\-driven growth.

**Success in 6 Months**

* Build a scalable lifecycle automation framework and implement it in Marketing Cloud/Data Cloud.
* Implement integrated lifecycle data flows and multi\-touch models across our GTM stack.
* Deploy automated programs across key funnel stages to improve marketing efficiency.
* Strengthen the connection between marketing activity and revenue outcomes.

  

Ready to build the infrastructure that allows marketing to operate as a data\-driven revenue engine?


Would you like me to generate a technical assessment test to evaluate candidates on their Salesforce Data Cloud and Zapier integration skills? Then apply today for immediate consideration.

title: Go-To-Market Engineer
description:
**About DoorLoop**

**﻿**DoorLoop is property management software built for speed and the smart choice for people who take growth seriously. With offices in Miami, New York City, and Tel Aviv, we’re a global company helping property owners and managers move faster, scale smarter, and get real support, real fast.


We’re proudly People First. That’s why we’re a Certified Great Place to Work, recognized by Forbes as one of America’s Best Startup Employers in both 2024 and 2025, and earn top ratings on Glassdoor.

**Mission**


DoorLoop is hiring a GTM Engineer to rebuild and scale our GTM systems and architecture as we move upmarket and support enterprise GTM execution. This role will play a critical part in transforming a legacy Salesforce environment—originally designed for a single funnel—into a flexible, multi\-funnel platform that supports complex routing, trusted attribution, scalable automation, and AI\-powered GTM workflows across Marketing, Sales, and RevOps.


This is a hands\-on builder role for someone who enjoys solving complex GTM problems, reducing manual work, and designing durable, intelligent architecture that enables speed today without creating tech debt tomorrow to bolster revenue generation.

**Responsibilities**

* Own Salesforce architecture and GTM system design, including objects, fields, relationships, flows, validation logic, routing, and integrations.
* Rebuild and simplify a heavily customized legacy Salesforce environment to support enterprise GTM execution and long\-term scale.
* Design, build, and maintain GTM automations and workflows, including AI\-powered workflows and decisioning, to reduce manual effort and improve reliability.
* Implement flexible, segment\-aware routing frameworks, incorporating deterministic logic and AI\-assisted decisioning where appropriate.
* Design and implement GTM system changes using an experimentation mindset, including clear hypotheses, safe rollout strategies, validation plans, and pre\-/post\-change measurement.
* Partner closely with Marketing and RevOps to support lifecycle management, lead and account scoring, attribution, and segmentation infrastructure.
* Support account\-based GTM strategies through account hierarchies, enrichment, scoring, and targeting logic.
* Collaborate with Data Engineering and Analytics to ensure Salesforce architecture cleanly feeds Snowflake and Tableau for downstream reporting.
* Leverage webhooks, workflow orchestration tools (e.g., n8n), AI services, and code\-based logic to extend GTM automation beyond Salesforce.
* Integrate and leverage web analytics and product data (e.g., PostHog) to support lifecycle logic, attribution, routing, and GTM experimentation.
* Ensure GTM system reliability and data quality, proactively identifying and resolving issues before they impact the business.
* Document system architecture, workflows, automation decisions, and experiment outcomes, including AI usage and guardrails, to ensure maintainability and shared understanding.
* Participate in RevOps intake and prioritization, balancing strategic system rebuilds with ongoing GTM needs.

  


Requirements:  

  

**Must\-Have Experience \& Attributes**

* 3–6\+ years of experience in GTM Engineering, Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or similar roles at a high\-growth SaaS company.
* Deep hands\-on experience with Salesforce architecture, including complex object relationships and automation (Flows, validation rules).
* Strong systems\-thinking mindset with experience rebuilding or refactoring legacy GTM systems.
* Experience integrating Salesforce with marketing automation platforms (e.g., HubSpot), web analytics platforms (e.g., PostHog), and other GTM tooling.
* Strong understanding of GTM funnels, including routing, lifecycle stages, scoring, and attribution.
* Experience designing or implementing AI\-powered workflows, decisioning, or automation within GTM systems.
* Comfort working with webhooks, workflow automation tools, AI services, and code\-like logic, even if you are not a traditional software engineer.
* Demonstrated ability to balance precision and speed — measuring twice and building systems that last.

title: GTM Engineer
description:
At SolarWinds, we're a people\-first company. Our purpose is to enrich the lives of the people we serve—including our employees, customers, shareholders, partners, and communities. Join us in our mission to help customers accelerate business transformation with simple, powerful, and secure solutions.



The ideal candidate thrives in an innovative, fast\-paced environment and is collaborative, accountable, ready, and empathetic. We're looking for individuals who believe they can accomplish more as a team and create lasting growth for themselves and others. We hire based on attitude, competency, and commitment. Solarians are ready to advance our world\-class solutions in a fast\-paced environment and accept the challenge to lead with purpose. If you're looking to build your career with an exceptional team, you've come to the right place. Join SolarWinds and grow with us!

**Overview**



SolarWinds is undergoing a significant transformation toward our cloud future. This pivotal moment requires a new team of expert technology strategists to deliver against our strategic vision. This role focuses on scaling AI\-powered agents and automation tools to support the demand generation campaigns for our Observability, Service Management, and Database subscription portfolio.



Team \& Reporting: This position is a key part of the GTM Technology team within Marketing Strategy \& Operations. The GTM Tech team supports both Marketing and Sales by providing tools, enablement, and insights to manage the overall lead flow across inbound and outbound activities.


**Core Responsibilities**


* The GTM Engineer will be responsible for the full lifecycle of AI and automation solutions, from design to governance.
* AI Engineering \& Automation
* Design, develop, and deploy AI agents and machine learning orchestration patterns (e.g., prompts, chains, context packs) for GTM functions.
* Build and maintain complex Zapier Canvas automations and high\-impact GTM integrations.
* Develop retrieval integrations (e.g., Glean/Genie, transcripts, product telemetry) to ensure agents are grounded with accurate, real\-time business context.
* Implement and manage Human\-in\-the\-Loop (HITL) approval workflows for critical processes.
* Build reusable automation modules, templates, and workflow standards for enterprise\-wide adoption.


**Operations, Governance, and Reliability**


* Establish scalable governance frameworks and processes for AI agent deployment, behavior management, and compliance with ethical and security guidelines.
* Monitor system health, error rates, and uptime, ensuring integration reliability across the GTM stack (Salesforce, Marketo, Outreach, Qualified, 6sense, Slack, Google).
* Define, track, and continuously optimize key performance indicators (KPIs) for agent task accuracy, resolution speed, and measurable business impact (ROI).


**GTM Strategy \& Enablement**


* Translate sophisticated marketing and sales programs into technical specifications, with a strong emphasis on programmatic execution and evergreen email nurture design.
* Serve as the internal AI evangelist, developing documentation, knowledge bases, and training playbooks to empower cross\-functional teams in adopting agentic solutions.
* Work closely with stakeholders in Demand Generation, IT, Security, and Sales to align AI deployments with broader business priorities.


**Required Technical Qualifications**


* Experience: 3–5 years in B2B marketing, Revenue Operations, or Sales Strategy, with a deep understanding of lead funnels, ABM principles, and demand generation metrics.
* AI/LLM Proficiency: Proven experience with AI prompt engineering, understanding of agent alignment, and failure mode management in AI systems.
* Data \& Systems Literacy: Comfort with structured and unstructured datasets, strong preference for SQL proficiency, and the ability to independently analyze agent performance data.
* Platform Expertise: Proficiency in a range of GTM and automation tools, including:
* CRM (Salesforce/SFDC)
* Marketing Automation Platforms
* Automation Platforms (Zapier, Make, Retool, Relevance AI)
* Familiarity with agent platforms like Glean Agents, Google Agentspace, or similar ecosystems.


**Preferred but Not Required**


* Foundational knowledge in Python or JavaScript, or "vibe\-coding" aptitude, for managing tool interactions and API\-first platforms.
* Experience with LLMs, agent architectures, or agent orchestration frameworks (like LangChain or CrewAI).
* Familiarity with REST APIs and integrating third\-party systems.
* Background in no\-code/low\-code platforms.
* Experience implementing MCP frameworks between GTM tools.

  

SolarWinds is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. SolarWinds will consider all qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, age, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, disability, veteran status or any other characteristic protected by law.



All applications are treated in accordance with the SolarWinds Privacy Notice: https://www.solarwinds.com/applicant\-privacy\-notice

title: GTM Engineer
description:
**About Sim**
-------------


Sim is building the leading platform for AI agents—enabling developers and enterprises to visually create, launch, and manage high\-performing agents that automate the world’s workflows. Our mission is simple: agents will run the world, and Sim is the primary means by which that happens. We’re backed by world\-class investors including Standard Capital, Paul Graham, Perplexity, SV Angel, and Y Combinator, and we’ve been open source from day one.


We're a small, fast\-moving team based in San Francisco, building together in person every day. 70,000\+ developers use Sim; your work ships fast and impacts real users at scale. We believe in ownership, excellence, and ambitious builders shaping the future from the ground up.

**About the Role**
------------------


This is a foundational role: Sim is hiring our first GTM Engineer to build the company’s go\-to\-market and RevOps infrastructure from the ground up. You won’t just optimize existing workflows—you'll architect them. You’ll partner directly with leadership to define, implement, and scale our GTM systems, automations, and data flows. If you want to operate as a technical founder for our GTM function and ship quickly with massive ownership, this role is for you.


You'll work full\-time, in\-person, out of our San Francisco office.

**What You'll Do:**
-------------------

* **Build from zero:** Create Sim’s GTM infrastructure from scratch—integrating best\-in\-class tools like Salesforce, Clay, Gong, enrichment APIs, and more into a seamless automated engine
* **Invent internal automation:** Design and build AI agents and custom workflows to automate account research, minimize manual tasks, and personalize outreach at scale
* **Engineer data flows:** Architect the middleware and webhooks that ensure data integrity and sync between Sim’s product, CRM, and internal systems
* **Programmatic GTM:** Translate top\-level GTM strategy into automated workflows, custom internal tools, and data\-driven outbound campaigns
* **Found and scale:** Set the technical standard and shape the DNA of Sim’s GTM/Revenue Operations function for years to come

**What We’re Looking For**
--------------------------

* 3\+ years of experience in GTM Engineering, technical RevOps, or similar technical roles
* Proficiency writing code (Python, JavaScript, or SQL) and familiarity working with APIs
* Track record of integrating, automating, and scaling SaaS and AI tool stacks
* Strong understanding of sales funnels, GTM business logic, and operations
* Experience with modern GTM tools (Clay, Claude Code, Parallel, Unify, Sim, scraping/indexing the web, etc.)
* High bias toward action and "shipping v1 today"—you thrive in ambiguity and fast\-paced teams

**Why Sim**
-----------

* **Foundational impact:** You’ll build and define Sim’s GTM infrastructure and shape how agents are sold, deployed, and supported
* **Immediate scale:** Your work ships to 70,000\+ developers and customers right now
* **World\-class backers:** Series A led by Standard Capital, with Paul Graham, Perplexity, SV Angel, and Y Combinator
* **Open source culture:** 26,000\+ GitHub stars and a passionate developer community
* **Competitive compensation:** Competitive pay \+ meaningful equity
* **Full benefits:** Comprehensive health insurance and relocation support
* **Visa sponsorship available**

**Equal Opportunity**
---------------------


Sim is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all team members. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.


Compensation Range: $120K \- $200K

title: Go-To-Market Engineer
description:
**About DoorLoop**

**﻿**DoorLoop is property management software built for speed and the smart choice for people who take growth seriously. With offices in Miami, New York City, and Tel Aviv, we’re a global company helping property owners and managers move faster, scale smarter, and get real support, real fast.


We’re proudly People First. That’s why we’re a Certified Great Place to Work, recognized by Forbes as one of America’s Best Startup Employers in both 2024 and 2025, and earn top ratings on Glassdoor.

**Mission**


DoorLoop is hiring a GTM Engineer to rebuild and scale our GTM systems and architecture as we move upmarket and support enterprise GTM execution. This role will play a critical part in transforming a legacy Salesforce environment—originally designed for a single funnel—into a flexible, multi\-funnel platform that supports complex routing, trusted attribution, scalable automation, and AI\-powered GTM workflows across Marketing, Sales, and RevOps.


This is a hands\-on builder role for someone who enjoys solving complex GTM problems, reducing manual work, and designing durable, intelligent architecture that enables speed today without creating tech debt tomorrow to bolster revenue generation.

**Responsibilities**

* Own Salesforce architecture and GTM system design, including objects, fields, relationships, flows, validation logic, routing, and integrations.
* Rebuild and simplify a heavily customized legacy Salesforce environment to support enterprise GTM execution and long\-term scale.
* Design, build, and maintain GTM automations and workflows, including AI\-powered workflows and decisioning, to reduce manual effort and improve reliability.
* Implement flexible, segment\-aware routing frameworks, incorporating deterministic logic and AI\-assisted decisioning where appropriate.
* Design and implement GTM system changes using an experimentation mindset, including clear hypotheses, safe rollout strategies, validation plans, and pre\-/post\-change measurement.
* Partner closely with Marketing and RevOps to support lifecycle management, lead and account scoring, attribution, and segmentation infrastructure.
* Support account\-based GTM strategies through account hierarchies, enrichment, scoring, and targeting logic.
* Collaborate with Data Engineering and Analytics to ensure Salesforce architecture cleanly feeds Snowflake and Tableau for downstream reporting.
* Leverage webhooks, workflow orchestration tools (e.g., n8n), AI services, and code\-based logic to extend GTM automation beyond Salesforce.
* Integrate and leverage web analytics and product data (e.g., PostHog) to support lifecycle logic, attribution, routing, and GTM experimentation.
* Ensure GTM system reliability and data quality, proactively identifying and resolving issues before they impact the business.
* Document system architecture, workflows, automation decisions, and experiment outcomes, including AI usage and guardrails, to ensure maintainability and shared understanding.
* Participate in RevOps intake and prioritization, balancing strategic system rebuilds with ongoing GTM needs.

  


Requirements:  

  

**Must\-Have Experience \& Attributes**

* 3–6\+ years of experience in GTM Engineering, Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or similar roles at a high\-growth SaaS company.
* Deep hands\-on experience with Salesforce architecture, including complex object relationships and automation (Flows, validation rules).
* Strong systems\-thinking mindset with experience rebuilding or refactoring legacy GTM systems.
* Experience integrating Salesforce with marketing automation platforms (e.g., HubSpot), web analytics platforms (e.g., PostHog), and other GTM tooling.
* Strong understanding of GTM funnels, including routing, lifecycle stages, scoring, and attribution.
* Experience designing or implementing AI\-powered workflows, decisioning, or automation within GTM systems.
* Comfort working with webhooks, workflow automation tools, AI services, and code\-like logic, even if you are not a traditional software engineer.
* Demonstrated ability to balance precision and speed — measuring twice and building systems that last.
* Comfortable pushing back and saying “no” when a request introduces unnecessary complexity or long\-term tech debt.
* Strong cross\-functional collaboration skills and clear communication with technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* High ownership mentality with a strong bar for reliability, quality, and measurable impact.

**Nice\-to\-Have**

* Apex or programmatic Salesforce experience for edge cases.
* Experience with workflow orchestration tools such as n8n.
* Experience operationalizing AI models or agents within production GTM workflows.
* Familiarity with enrichment and ABM tooling (ZoomInfo, Clearbit, Clay).
* Understanding of how CRM and product data feed data warehouses and BI tools.


\*\*\*This is not a data engineering role

**Preferred Traits**

* Builder mindset: pragmatic, curious, and solutions\-oriented.
* Strong attention to detail without losing sight of long\-term scalability.
* Comfortable operating in ambiguity and defining better system patterns.
* Motivated by leverage — you want your work to make GTM teams faster and more effective.

  


Benefits:
  

* **Unlimited paid time off:** take unlimited personal, sick, and vacation days.
* **401(k):** plan for retirement with 4% matching and instant vesting.
* **Medical, dental, and vision insurance:** we offer full medical coverage for employees through United Healthcare and full dental and vision coverage through Guardian, with 25% coverage for dependents across all plans.
* **Life insurance:** $100,000 policy fully covered by DoorLoop.

title: GTM Engineer, Hazel AI
description:
**About Altruist**



Altruist is transforming the multi\-trillion dollar wealth management industry by building an AI platform for wealth professionals. We partner with financial advisors nationwide, empowering them to grow, optimize time and resources, and deliver superior outcomes for their clients.



We're looking for exceptional talent to help us achieve our mission of making financial advice better, more affordable, and accessible to all. If you're passionate about challenging the status quo and want to do the most important work of your life, we'd love to meet you!


**But first, our values**


**Kindness** \- Kindness doesn’t *just* equal niceness. We listen to understand. We embrace, and encourage healthy debate and diverse perspectives. We approach conflict openly, honestly, and respectfully.  

  

**Brilliance** \- Humility is the skill we’re most proud of and possessing a growth mindset is always top of mind. We take ownership in everything we touch; regularly using our unique superpowers to reach a common goal as a team. We succeed and fail as one.  

  

**Grit** \- When challenges arise, we stay laser focused on achieving our mission and finding a way forward, even when it’s hard. We are nimble and maintain a sense of urgency, swiftly adapting to change and overcoming obstacles.

**About Hazel**



Hazel is building the AI engine for wealth management that helps unlock 10x growth, efficiency and value for financial advisors and their clients in a regulated industry. Since its launch last September, Hazel has organically and rapidly grown its user base.



Hazel is a part of Altruist’s broader mission to make financial advice better, more affordable, and accessible to all.


**The opportunity**



Architect the commercial infrastructure for Hazel. You’ll sit at the intersection of sales, marketing, product, and data, turning GTM strategy into automated systems that generate pipeline, accelerate deals, and surface the insights that drive our business strategy. As one of the first GTM Engineers at Hazel, you’ll build foundational systems that will power our growth for years. If you love writing code as much as you love closing revenue loops — and you want to do it inside one of the most exciting AI companies in fintech — this is the role for you.


**What you'll do**


* Design, build, and own Hazel’s GTM tech stack – including CRM (HubSpot/Salesforce), marketing automation, data enrichment, and outbound sequencing tools.
* Build automated workflows and AI\-powered systems to support lead scoring, lifecycle marketing, outbound prospecting, and account\-based motion.
* Write Python and/or JavaScript to connect data sources, automate enrichment pipelines, and extend CRM capabilities through APIs and custom integrations.
* Instrument the full funnel – from top\-of\-funnel awareness through activation and expansion – to surface actionable insights and revenue attribution to GTM leadership.
* Partner with Sales, Marketing, and Product to translate business needs into scalable technical solutions; own delivery end\-to\-end.
* Build and maintain a clean, reliable data foundation in our revenue data warehouse, enabling accurate forecasting and pipeline analytics.
* Evaluate and implement AI tools (e.g., Clay, Apollo, Instantly, and emerging LLM\-based GTM tools) to amplify rep productivity and pipeline quality.
* Reduce manual ops overhead by automating repetitive GTM tasks so the team can focus on high\-leverage activities.
* Willingness and comfort serving as technical support for AEs on sales calls.


**What you'll bring**


* 2\-4 years of experience in Product/GTM Engineering at a high\-growth SaaS or fintech company.
* Demonstrated ability to write production\-quality code in Python, TypeScript or Javascript to build integrations, automation workflows, and data pipelines.
* Have built or prototyped AI\-powered workflows using LLM APIs, Claude Code and/or OpenClaw.
* Hands\-on experience with CRM platforms (HubSpot or Salesforce), marketing automation, and sales engagement tools (Outreach, Salesloft, Apollo, or similar).
* Strong SQL skills and comfort working with data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, or Databricks) to build revenue dashboards and funnel analytics.
* Experience with data enrichment and orchestration tools (Clay, Clearbit, ZoomInfo, or similar) to build intelligent lead flows.
* A systems\-thinker who can design scalable GTM architecture, not just patch point solutions.
* Strong cross\-functional communication skills – you’ll translate between business stakeholders and technical systems regularly.
* Comfort with ambiguity and early\-stage pace – you move fast, prioritize ruthlessly, and iterate on the fly.


**Bonus points**


* Experience building GTM systems for AI\-native products, where the sales motion and buyer education are non\-standard.
* Experience with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar) to build AI\-powered GTM workflows – lead qualification agents, email personalization, call summarization, etc.
* Background in data engineering or analytics engineering (dbt, Fivetran, Segment, or similar).
* Prior experience at an early\-stage startup where you were the first or one of the first technical hires on the GTM side.


**Leveling \& compensation**



This role has a target compensation range of $200,000\-$225,000\. Final level and compensation is individualized and will be determined based on overall experience, qualifications, and interview performance.

**What we bring**



Attracting and retaining top\-tier talent is a priority. We are proud of the culture we’ve built and are cognizant of the ever\-changing professional landscape. Our dynamic offering of perks and benefits are tailored for you to feel your best while doing your best.


* A hybrid work schedule for most positions to promote strong, in\-person collaboration.
* Stunning, amenity\-filled office spaces in Culver City, CA, San Francisco, CA, and Dallas, TX. Our offices are intentionally designed for comfort, collaboration, and productivity.
* Competitive pay and equity for eligible positions.
* Premium healthcare, dental, and vision insurance plans (HMO and PPO).
* 401k savings plan with a 4% match and immediate vesting.
* 16 week paid parental leave.
* Professional growth and development opportunities including an employee mobility program and an annual L\&D budget allocation for each employee.
* Company perks program (includes discounts on pet insurance, fitness, cell phone plans, and travel, etc.).
* Financial guidance program (includes counseling on navigating debt, tracking personal spend, saving and planning goals, home\-purchasing preparedness, etc.).
* One month work from anywhere policy (with the exception of a few countries).


*Total compensation includes a competitive benefits package, along with equity in the form of Stock Options (ISOs) for eligible roles. For salaried positions, a salary offer will be determined by a number of factors including experience, skill level, internal pay equity, geographic location, and other relevant business considerations. We review all employee pay and compensation programs regularly to ensure* *fair, equitable, and competitive pay. At Altruist, we are committed to providing fair, equitable, and competitive compensation by leveraging market data to inform our pay bands. Base salaries will be reviewed at regular intervals throughout the year, typically in conjunction with performance review cycles. By evaluating compensation on a regular basis, we are able to reward high performance and ensure all employees have opportunities for growth.*


*Don’t meet every single requirement? Studies have shown that women and people of color are less likely to apply to jobs unless they meet every single qualification. At Altruist we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive, and authentic workplace, so if you’re excited about this role, but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyways. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.*

title: GTM Engineer
description:
**About Spekit**

  

At Spekit, we’re building a truly context\-aware experience where you never have to *search* for the right answer again. It starts with **Sidekick**, our execution layer that lives in your browser, Slack, and beyond. Sidekick anticipates a sales rep’s next move, translating complex signals into in\-flow coaching, automated workflows, and deal\-aware content creation — constantly answering the only question that matters:

 *“Given everything I know about this deal, what should I say, share, or do right now?”*

  

But delivering that experience requires more than a chatbot. It requires an authoritative system of truth that governs how a company goes to market. A content platform that keeps information dynamic and accurate as the business evolves, connecting enablement to real revenue outcomes. An intelligence layer humans rely on, and the one other AI systems consume. It requires, Spekit.

  

Recognized as a *Visionary* in Gartner’s 2025 Magic Quadrant for Revenue Enablement Platforms, we’re reimagining how people work and learn in an AI\-first world. Come build with us!

 **Backed by:** $60M\+ from Craft Ventures, Felicis, Foundry Group, and Renegade Partners

**Trusted by:** A 2025 Gartner Visionary powering teams at Southwest Airlines, Justworks, GitLab, and ZoomInfo

 **The Opportunity**

  

We’re hiring a Growth Engineer to architect and operationalize the intelligent systems that power how we generate demand, qualify opportunities, route signals, and accelerate revenue.

  

This role is not about managing campaigns. It is about engineering the machine behind them.

  

You will design and build the automated, AI\-driven internal infrastructure that transforms fragmented tools and manual workflows into a cohesive, self\-improving GTM system — one that increases pipeline, improves conversion, and reduces operational drag as we scale. Some weeks you’ll be writing code to build AI automations or event\-based nurture streams; other weeks you’ll be improving lead routing logic, or designing AI agents that generate persona\-specific content on the fly.

  

This role is for someone fluent in modern GTM systems and AI\-powered tools—someone who can architect, automate, and scale how we generate demand, convert pipeline, and operate efficiently as we grow.

  

*Note: This is* *not* *a software developer role.*


The GTM Engineer sits on the Marketing team and will report to the Chief Marketing Officer. The role focuses on building automations, workflows, and AI\-driven GTM systems — *not developing core product code or training models*.

**What you’ll own:**

* **Build our GTM engine through AI and automation strategies and techniques.** Design and connect systems that turn messy marketing workflows into scalable, intelligent processes.
* **Lead data and signal processing.** Move beyond static lookup tables — use AI to understand titles, roles, and personas dynamically, enriching data to get SDRs and AEs in front of the right opportunities, faster.
* **Implement AI agents and automations.** Build nurture sequences, event follow\-ups, and persona\-tailored content streams powered by LLMs and custom prompts.
* **Scale human capacity through automation.** Help our small team of four operate like a team of twelve by embedding efficiency and intelligence into every process.
* **Optimize system integration and responsiveness.** Connect tools and platforms to ensure MQLs are acted on immediately, lead data flows cleanly, and every GTM touchpoint reinforces engagement.
* **Partner with RevOps.** Integrate deeply with the Revenue Operations function to ensure clean and consistent handover, data and ultimately drive quality pipeline growth
* **Collaborate across functions.** Partner with Marketing, Sales and Product to ensure that AI systems, campaigns, and conversion tactics are tightly aligned

**What this role is NOT**

* Not a product software engineering role
* Not a traditional marketing operations role
* Not a campaign manager

**About You**

* At least 3\-4\+ years of hands\-on experience in GTM, RevOps, growth, or technical operations roles
* You’re a builder with an engineer’s mindset and a marketer’s curiosity. You care about clean data, fast execution, and measurable business impact.
* Exposure to sales workflows—you understand where automation can help or hurt
* You collaborate naturally with marketers, sales teams, and operators, translating their goals into systems that deliver.
* You understand how to design agentic workflows and are familiar with major LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.).
* You write code, not just configure tools. Python or JavaScript is ideal, but the language matters less than your ability to ship working automations.
* You know prompt engineering well and you know how to weave prompts into real marketing systems for better performance and personalization.
* You thrive in ambiguity. When given a challenge with an unclear path to execution, you’ll ask smart questions, prototype fast, and iterate toward impact.
* You want to invent as you go! No fixed roadmap, just constant learning, experimentation, and impact.


Why This Role

  

This is a rare opportunity to help invent the future of AI\-powered go\-to\-market engines. You’ll be building new internal infrastructure as you go, working directly with leadership to define priorities, test new ideas, and shape how AI changes the way modern GTM teams operate.

  

If you’re excited by ambiguity, love to build, and want to be at the intersection of AI, engineering, and growth, this role is for you.

 **We've got you covered!**

100% paid employee **Medical, Dental, Vision**, and **Life Insurance**. Benefits begin on your first day!


**Meaningful equity**


**Flexible Paid Time Off (PTO) policy**


**Sick time pay**


**Your birthday off!**


**Paid Holidays \+ 1 week end\-of\-year company shut down**


 Company sponsored **401k**


**Yearly Learning \& Development Stipend**


**Maternity/Paternity benefits** (both birthing and non\-birthing parents)


**The chance to help build from the ground up** – the hires we’re making now are foundational to our growth as a company!

 **The culture that defines us: Y O K E D**

**Yoke**: We move as one, because that’s how we move faster and achieve more. Our speed, strength and ability to innovate lie in how we align, collaborate, support, and courageously challenge and give feedback to one another, running towards our shared mission

**Own it**: We think like owners. We’re proud of our work, we follow through on commitments, and we do what’s right, even when it’s hard.

**Keep It Simple Yet** ***Spektacular***: We cut through complexity and relentlessly craft intuitive, fast, and delightful experiences—in our product and in how we work— to move fast, earn our own obsession, and create true, lasting customer love.

**Enjoy the Journey: We laugh along the way.** We’re kind to each other, we pause to embrace the moment, and celebrate the small wins, even when things get tough, because we recognize that what brings meaning to what we do is who we get to do it with.

**Drive:** We push to get better every day because we love what we do. Growth, curiosity, learning and innovation fuel us. We embrace feedback and the challenges in front of us, moving with purpose, intention and speed

 **About the Team**


At Spekit, we don't just talk about creating opportunity — we build it! With two female founders and a commitment to representation in tech, we're intentional about fostering an inclusive culture, supporting underrepresented communities, and building a team that reflects the diversity of our users. You'll join a collaborative, mission\-driven team building category\-defining AI products that meaningfully change how people learn and work. This is a rare opportunity to build an iconic company, work directly with leadership, and see your ideas ship quickly in a high\-trust environment. If you're excited by the challenge of building elegantly simple, intelligent software that solves real problems for real users, we'd love to talk.


Compensation Range: $130K \- $150K

title: GTM Engineer (Sales)
description:
**About Orchestry**
-------------------


Orchestry is a rapidly growing SaaS company in the Microsoft 365 ecosystem, helping organizations simplify, govern, and automate their digital workplace. Our platform empowers teams through intuitive governance, lifecycle management, provisioning, automation, and reporting, reducing complexity while increasing adoption and control. We're a remote\-first team built on curiosity, kindness, and getting sh\*t done. If you love solving real customer problems with smart technical solutions, you'll fit right in.


**About the Role**
------------------


Orchestry is on a mission to simplify governance and reduce manual work in Microsoft 365\. We're growing fast and building a scalable revenue engine to match our product momentum.  

  

We're hiring a GTM Sales Engineer to help design, build, and execute the systems that power our outbound and pipeline generation motion. We are looking for a person who is obsessed with understanding our customers, understanding their issues, and creating repeatable tooling to drive pipeline.
  

  

This role sits at the intersection of Sales, Marketing, and Systems; helping us generate pipeline, run outbound programs, and scale the tooling and automation behind our go\-to\-market motion. You'll work alongside the Head of Sales and Account Executives to create repeatable outbound motions, tighten our data and targeting, and run campaigns end\-to\-end using modern GTM tools (Clay, HubSpot, Instantly, LinkedIn, etc.). You'll also use AI aggressively to move faster, automate work, and experiment intelligently.  

  

This is not a traditional Sales Engineer role focused on demos and technical discovery, and it's not a pure SDR role either. It is a hands\-on builder role for someone who understands modern outbound deeply, can operationalize tools like Clay and HubSpot at scale, and wants to directly influence company growth.


**What You'll Be Doing**
------------------------


### **Pipeline Generation \& Outbound Execution**


* Build and launch multi\-channel outbound campaigns across email, LinkedIn and other formats using tools like Instantly, HeyReach, Clay and Claude Code.
* Partner with Sales to identify ICP segments, priority accounts, and messaging strategies that drive qualified pipeline.
* Continuously test subject lines, sequencing logic, personalization depth, and channel mix to improve conversion rates.
* Manage outbound deliverability fundamentals including domain setup, inbox rotation, and sender reputation


### **GTM Systems \& Automation**


* Design and maintain scalable enrichment and targeting workflows in Clay (or other tools), including waterfall enrichment, integrations, routing logic, and structured table architecture.
* Own data flow into HubSpot, ensuring accurate contact enrichment, lifecycle stage management, segmentation, and campaign attribution.
* Integrate and optimize tooling across the GTM stack to eliminate manual work and reduce operational friction.
* Leverage AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, GPT workflows) to automate research, personalization, and repetitive outbound tasks while maintaining quality.


### **Research, Targeting \& Data Quality**


* Build high\-fit account and contact lists aligned to our ICP using structured targeting and enrichment workflows.
* Improve CRM hygiene and data reliability to ensure Sales is working from clean, actionable intelligence.

Develop repeatable “list enrich sequence measure* optimize” workflows that scale.


### **Cross\-Functional Alignment \& Reporting**


* Collaborate with Sales, Marketing, and leadership to align campaigns with revenue targets.
* Track campaign performance inside HubSpot and related tools; identify performance bottlenecks and iterate quickly.
* Document processes and playbooks so outbound systems become repeatable and scalable across the team.


**Required Skills \& Competencies**
-----------------------------------


* 4\+ years in a growth, outbound, RevOps, GTM, sales operations, or analytical role in a SaaS environment.
* Strong hands\-on expertise with modern outbound tools that could include Clay, Claude Code, Instantly, HeyReach, Apollo and others.
* Deep understanding of modern outbound infrastructure including sequencing tools, deliverability best practices, inbox strategy, and LinkedIn automation.
* Experience working in HubSpot with segmentation, lifecycle stages, and reporting.
* Strong written communication skills with the ability to craft compelling outbound messaging.
* Highly organized and execution\-focused, with the ability to run multiple campaigns simultaneously.
* Strong ownership mindset, you thrive in ambiguity and operate independently.


**Preferred Qualifications**
----------------------------


* Experience targeting IT, Security, or Microsoft 365 personas.
* Familiarity with Microsoft 365 (SharePoint, Teams, Entra ID, Purview, Power Platform) and the governance / admin landscape.
* Experience at an early\-stage or high\-growth B2B SaaS company.
* Prior customer\-facing or sales experience.
* Familiarity with light scripting, APIs, or automation tools (Zapier, Make, n8n).
* Experience using AI tools to meaningfully accelerate GTM workflows.
* Bachelor's degree (or equivalent experience).


**Why You'll Love Working Here**
--------------------------------


* OTE between $110K\-$140K (CAD)
* Remote\-first work options and flexible scheduling to support work\-life balance
* Comprehensive benefits package, including healthcare
* Employee Stock Option Plan
* Collaborative and inclusive team culture
